use_cases: Showcasing premium features with immersive 3D visual effects
Portfolio or gallery item cards with interactive hover states
Product cards in e-commerce with mode toggle capability
ai_summary: A glass-morphism 3D image card component featuring interactive hover effects that rotate the card in 3D space using CSS transforms. Includes a dark/light mode toggle with smooth transitions and backdrop blur effects. Designed for showcasing premium features, portfolio items, or products with modern visual aesthetics.
